items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: What's going on?

items.speaker: Xiaoguan
items.text: Miss Yinlin! The Tacet Discords are here!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Go tell your grandma. Get everyone somewhere safe.

items.speaker: Xiaoguan
items.text: O-okay!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: What about you, Rover? Will you join them or flee while you can in this chaos?

options.text: They're not bad people...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: So you want to help protect them. Knew it.

options.text: You owe me the truth after this. Everything.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Everything, huh... The secrets I hold might be bigger than you imagine.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: If you really want to know... You'll need to survive this first!

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "(Chixia just called me. I wonder what's happening...)..."

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (Chixia just called me. I wonder what's happening...)

options.text: Oh no. Did I break the law or something?
Hello Chixia, what's up?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Huh? Is that your first reaction? Come on!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Anyway! You know, we could really use your help with this ongoing case!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Here's the thing, we could really use your help with this ongoing case...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: We've been getting a lot of missing persons reports recently.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Nobody ever saw those people assaulted or anything, they just vanished.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Some of those people are even Resonators or they've served in the military!

options.text: These cases might be connected.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Since you're always coming and going from the city, can you help me watch out for anything weird or suspicious?

options.text: Sure thing.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Thank you so much! Knew I could count on you!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Ring me up when you spot anything sus, yeah? Laterz!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (You received a message right after hanging up with Chixia.)

dialog.stepLabel: Man with Hollow Eyes: "Oh… So you've accepted my invitation, Rover...."

items.speaker: Man with Hollow Eyes
items.text: Oh… So you've accepted my invitation, Rover.

options.text: Are you from the Séance Society?

items.speaker: Man with Hollow Eyes
items.text: Well, yes. My name is Lirong.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Since you are here, you must have lost someone, too.

items.speaker: Shy Little Girl
items.text: Daddy…

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Now, Yuanyuan, no need to be afraid… {Male=He;Female=She}'s not one of those evil Patrollers. You're safe with me.

options.text: Is this your daughter?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Yes, my daughter… Her name is Yuanyuan. My only precious.

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: I am Daddy's precious?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Absolutely, my dear. We will stay together... Nothing can take you from me again...

options.text: She was taken from you?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Ah, yes... Once we were separated by an unfortunate turn of events... But now I have her back, thanks to the Séance Society's help...

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Truly a miracle, is it not?!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: And you… Yes, you too can be reunited with your loved ones... Just come join us...

options.text: So... Your daughter had died?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: No! She didn't... She was never gone!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Can't you see? Yuanyuan, she... She's still alive! Alive and well!

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Daddy!? What's happening…? You're scaring me…

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (He seems off. Is he Overclocking?)

options.text: Calm down! I'll get you a doctor!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: No! No doctor! I don't need anything!!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: I am not leaving her… You're not leaving daddy, right Yuanyuan?

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Wah... I...

options.text: He might hurt the girl... I must act fast!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Yuanyuan!

options.text: Stop, you're going to injure her.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Shut up! Take your hands off her NOW!

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: No! Daddy! *screams*
That's enough, Lirong.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Urgh…!?
She'll be safe in my care. You still have other things to do, remember?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Huff... Ugh... No! Don't! Yuanyuan!
Lirong!
Do you want to lose your daughter again?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Urgh… Gah… No, I... Fine, I'll leave it to you.

options.text: Do you know him?

items.text: Now, hand over the girl…
You see, that man is her father. Why do you want to separate them?

options.text: He is dangerous…

items.text: Oh well, whatever. Yuanyuan? Come over here please?

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Yes...
Good girl. Stay here, Yuanyuan.

options.text: What did you do!?

items.text: And why would you be concerned? Smart {Male=boys;Female=girls} know how to mind their own business.
Oh? You're quite the fighter… Hmm, how about…

options.text: We're not fighting now? I can go on if you want.

items.text: Shh... They're coming… It's the Patrollers. We can't let them find out about Yuanyuan.
Now if you don't want to get into trouble, better do as I say... I'll explain everything later.
Including what's happening with the "Séance Society"…

options.text: Fine.
No.

items.text: Smart choice...
Oh, don't be so pigheaded. What if I pinned the blame on you?
Say, for trying to abduct this little girl? You'll have a real time talking your way out of that... Right, Yuanyuan?

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Yes, Miss Yinlin...

options.text: (Guess I'll have to do as she said, for now.)

items.text: Good. Now come give me a hand. We'll need to hide the traces of fighting here.

dialog.stepLabel: Yinlin: "And the so-called Séance Society... They are the ones behind..."

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: And the so-called Séance Society... They are the ones behind Jinzhou's recent missing person cases.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: They offer these puppets to people who have lost their loved ones.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: These puppets can perfectly replicate the personalities of the deceased… To those mourning people, they are indistinguishable from the living.

options.text: Yuanyuan... Did she really pass away?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yes… With the puppet, she has been resurrected by her father's longing.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: People gave up everything to join this Society for one chance to reunite with their beloved.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: As for how they got their hands on these puppets... I have no idea yet.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Beware, the puppets may seem harmless, but those who got too attached are much more likely to Overclock.

options.text: Didn't know they were so dangerous...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Lirong's the recruiter. You're the perfect outsider, traveling all alone, ripe for the taking.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Heh... But it seems he picked the worst candidate possible.

options.text: Then why are you still helping him?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I need to apprehend the true culprit behind this group…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But this is not your problem. I'm on a mission. Leave now and forget everything that happened here today, will you?

options.text: Were you looking for this?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Lirong's transaction record… Where did you find it?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: *sigh*… You're such a box of surprises.

options.text: You promised to tell me everything.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Sure, why not. I'll give you what you want...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But I don't want prying eyes. If you're really that curious, meet me outside the city at these coordinates.

dialog.stepLabel: Yinlin: "Lirong. Here's your daughter, as I promised...."

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Lirong. Here's your daughter, as I promised.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Yuanyuan!! I was so afraid… I can't bear to lose you again…

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Please don't cry, Daddy… Was I being bad?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: No, you're always a good girl... always...

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: Ugh, enough with the make-believe. That's a puppet.

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Daddy… am I a puppet?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: No! You're not! Yuanyuan, I...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yuanyuan's ten times more human than you people.

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: You call that thing human? Hah! That's just a robot lab rat.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: You...!

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: Enough, we don't have time for this… Where's our stuff? Bring them out.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Lirong, go bring them the prototype puppets.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Huff... Huff... I…

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: Hey… We ain't got all day. Hurry up.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: No! I won't let you have them!

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: We'll make you regret this...

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: After him! You're going nowhere either, Missy!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Here we go…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: (Lirong's trying to escape with the puppets. Here's hoping that Rover can stop him in time…)

options.text: Lirong is our only lead... I must follow him!

items.text: You follow closely behind Lirong.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (Found him. Lirong is here.)

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (I should go take a closer look...)

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Daddy… I'm tired...

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: It's okay, Yuanyuan... They won't find us here.

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Those scary people... Are they coming after me?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Not just you, Yuanyuan... They want all the puppets here. But I won't let them.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: I'll make sure every puppet finds home, together with people who love and need them. I will NOT let those freaks use them for experiments!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Master Dollmaker… How could you be the first to betray our belief...

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: ("Dollmaker"… Is that the leader of the Séance Society?)

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: Is Master Dollmaker bad, Daddy?

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: I... I'm not sure anymore. He was our hope... He saved us all, but...

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: *sigh* Doesn't matter now. I must get all of you to safety first.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (I guess they still have some morals. There's still things they won't do.)
I spotted them! Over there!

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: You can't hide from this good ol' sniffer of mine!

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Yuanyuan, get behind Daddy, quick...

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: I'll grab these puppets now. What about that guy, boss?

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: Ice him… We'll take that puppet behind him too.

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Huh… Urgh… Huff... I will not... Let you! Aaaghhah!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (Lirong's going to severely Overclock at this rate.)

items.speaker: Lirong
items.text: Eek… *gasp*…

items.speaker: Yuanyuan
items.text: H-Help!

options.text: Yuanyuan, take your father somewhere safe!

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: Hey! What the hell are you doing here?!

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: One {Male=man;Female=woman}'s not gonna make a difference. Get rid of them now!
Forgetting someone, are we?

dialog.stepLabel: Chubby Fractsidus Member: "What the… Those idiots. They were supposed to take care of y..."

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: What the… Those idiots. They were supposed to take care of you!

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: Careful!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Sorry I knocked out your friends earlier. We're not planning to start anything with the Fractsidus, really.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: What do you say? Care to give Lirong and his daughter a little break? They're our people, after all.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You may have these puppets here. We can pretend none of this ever happened.

items.speaker: Slim Fractsidus Member
items.text: You think we're stupid or what? We're taking the puppets, and you're all going under!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Aww, you sure you want to do this? We're business partners, remember?

items.speaker: Chubby Fractsidus Member
items.text: Partners? You're just a bunch of lab rat keepers trying to play the game!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: So they're not up for peace talks. What do you say, Rover?

options.text: Count me in. It's not like they'll let me off the hook.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hehe... True. You know your Fractsidus well.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You've got some moves. Impressive…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Guess I can rely on you a bit more. I'll be counting on you.

dialog.stepLabel: Yinlin: "How did you like the fight? Are you injured?..."

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: How did you like the fight? Are you injured?

options.text: Not a scratch.
They were a bit hard to handle.
I can take on a dozen more!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Those were the Fractsidus and you didn't bat an eye... Looks like you've got the skills, and the nerve too.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yeah, better stay cautious. I've seen too many die from recklessness.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Ooh, really? I'll sit back and leave it all to you next time.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: We took care of them for now… but there's probably more trouble coming our way.

options.text: Is your cover at risk?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: My, my... Are you worried about me?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: What a surprise. I thought you never trusted me this entire time.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Fine, I'll spare you the teasing for now… Your serious face is quite cute though.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't worry, we took care of all the Fractsidus people here. If the Society becomes suspicious, I'll just pin everything on them.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: They may still question me, but I've mastered gaining trust with lies. It's the key to being an undercover investigator.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Just like what I did to you… Try feeling your back.

options.text: You planted a bug on me!?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: A bug and a tracker. Yes. How else did you think I got here so quickly?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I put it there the first time we met.

options.text: Why did you do this?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: "Don't trust anyone"… That's the first thing I learned in training.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You may not belong to any group, but you seemed to care for Lirong and Yuanyuan, and you want to recover lost memories…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I can't risk you betraying me by helping them run off or selling me out. Better safe than sorry.

options.text: Then I'm sure you overheard the name "Dollmaker"?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Of course. Dollmaker... He must be a big deal in the Séance Society, or even their leader.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: We're getting close to the truth... But we have another issue at hand.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I did a quick checkup on Lirong. He just passed out from Overclocking. Lucky for him it wasn't that bad.

options.text: What about Yuanyuan?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yuanyuan returned to her puppet form once Lirong fell unconscious. Not even I can reactivate her now.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I doubt she'll be reactivated any time soon. We've reached a dead end with Lirong.

options.text: We can try the prototype puppets?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yeah, I was planning to. We may find some clues.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But we gotta move first. Can't stay here for long.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Go collect the puppets. I'll look after Lirong and Yuanyuan.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: We should be good in here. This safe house is equipped with signal jammers and counter-surveillance measures.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: The Fractsidus won't find us here.

options.text: Really living up to its name...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yes, it's as safe and secure as it gets.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Nothing gets in, and nothing gets out.

options.text: But... where are the Patrollers?

dialog.stepLabel: Yinlin: "Don't bother. You won't find any Patrollers here...."

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't bother. You won't find any Patrollers here.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I told you before...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't trust anyone. Remember?
What a special specimen...
Time to have my men take {Male=him;Female=her} back to the camp...

items.speaker: Patroller
items.text: Surrender now! We've got you surrounded! You are the leader here, aren't you?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: My, my. That's quite the party.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Hey! Who the hell are you? Let {Male=him;Female=her} go!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: And if I don't?

items.speaker: Patroller
items.text: Freeze! Shut up!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't worry. I'm not going anywhere. I've got a hostage, you see?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Whoa! You-You... Don't move!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I wouldn't try anything stupid if I were you. Can't risk the VIP of Jinzhou getting hurt, now can we?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Ugh, fine... Lower your weapons guys!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: "Trust me… Come this way."

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: So that's what the Séance Society was up to... Thanks for your statement, it really helped!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Somehow the Fractsidus was involved too! Who could have thought… Luckily you were there to stop them in time!

options.text: How's the Dollmaker?
How are the Séance Society people doing?

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: The man's still not saying anything... Guess we'll have to keep him under custody for now.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Nothing about that suspect lady either. We still have zero info on her.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Most of those Resonators have varying degrees of Overclocking. They need urgent care, the professionals from Huaxu Academy are already on it.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: A guy named Lirong had it worst, didn't wake up from his coma until yesterday.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: He's still recovering from some really bad aftereffects, but at least he's making progress.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Oh, so the missing cases led to an illegal cult-like organization AND a bunch of other twisted plans!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Unbelievable... We'd be toast without your help.

options.text: Actually, I couldn't do it without someone else's help.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Huh? And who's that?

options.text: An emissary of justice, hidden in the shadows.
An honorable companion.
I'm not sure whether she's a friend or foe.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: What? Come on, you need to be more specific… Whoever they are, sounds like they'll make for quite the Patroller.

options.text: I'll be sure to tell her that.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Well, that's it for now. Ring me up when you find something unusual again. I'll catch you later!

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Splendid view, right?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: As promised, I owe you a lot of explanation.

options.text: Had you been planning to get me involved?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: No, I wasn't expecting to meet you.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: My order was to oversee our deal with the Fractsidus.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You were just a pawn in my plan to find where Lirong kept the puppets.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But I didn't expect him to try and escape with them. Couldn't risk exposing myself yet, so I had to track him down and retrieve the puppets.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Around that time, Dollmaker caught wind of your special abilities. He asked me to bring you to that safe house.

options.text: You zapped me a little too hard back there.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hehe… Oh, really? I even upped the voltage for the best effect. Was that just a zap to you?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: No wonder our Dollmaker took so much interest in that body of yours.

options.text: So he couldn't recover my memories?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Unfortunately, no. He tried but couldn't gain access.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: According to him, you possess a power beyond his understanding that prevented him from prying into your mind. You might be more special than you had thought.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Said he couldn't read your mind without risking his own sanity, let alone retrieve any information... I can't imagine what the hell is going on beneath your skull.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Who knows? Maybe you helped some strangers again only to mess with the wrong person, and ended up with your memories gone.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: I say you should stop playing hero and take better care of yourself. You'll live longer that way.

options.text: Are you worried about me?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't think I need to, since you can handle yourself just fine. But... if you ever need my help, just let me know.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: We have a lot in common. Both alone in this world.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Maybe I'll keep you in my thoughts. A reminder that I'm not the only solitary soul out there.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: And eventually, we'll both learn to move through our lives with loneliness.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Perhaps the same loneliness was too much for Dollmaker to bear... That's why he gave up everything to resurrect my parents.

options.text: He had companions, he just never cherished them.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yes… After my parents' death, we all became chess pieces to him, myself included.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Raised me to be a Patroller for his own agenda. He needed a mole in the Public Security Bureau.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: In the end I did become a Patroller, but failed to stay by his side as he desired.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Maybe I'm indeed a heart-wrenching betrayer to him...

options.text: He dug his own grave.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yes... We all have to face the consequences of our actions. I don't plan to defend him.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: But if I had acted sooner, this whole mess could have been avoided. Why didn't I do something?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Perhaps… like everyone else in the Séance Society, I too held onto that naive pipe dream.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: The dream of finally meeting my parents and having a real family... I indulged in it more than I care to admit.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Deep down, I knew my dream was built upon the sacrifices of innocent lives... but I couldn't bear to shatter it.

options.text: In the end, you still fulfilled your duty. As a Patroller.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hmph... because I met you. A total outsider risking {Male=his;Female=her} life for me and for all those people...

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: A lot of it still remains unresolved. Dollmaker was merely a cog in the wheel. A bigger shadow lingers.

options.text: The Fractsidus…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Yes. We must stay vigilant until we expose the true culprits and destroy their plans for good.

options.text: We?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Don't tell me you're pulling out at this point?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: If you are, I may have to wipe my true identity from your head by force...

options.text: Please go easy on me…

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: It was a joke. Anyway, I should thank you... Because of you, I was able to accomplish far more and save many more lives than I imagined.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: You feel different. I have the feeling I can always trust your words, whatever you say.

options.text: Do you mean it?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hehe... Well, take a guess?

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Oh, and lastly… There is another thing I should thank you for. For trusting me all the way till the very end.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Until we meet again, Rover… Perhaps I'll meet you under an entirely different identity next time.

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "(No injuries. I still have my weapon and Terminal.)..."

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (No injuries. I still have my weapon and Terminal.)

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: (It's hard to tell from what little I've gathered so far. I should find out where this place is first.)

dialog.stepLabel: Yinlin: "No more markings in sight... This must be the safe house...."

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: No more markings in sight... This must be the safe house.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Look, there's a device on that wall.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: Hmm… We need a passcode.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: They were thorough. The safe house is hidden and has a passcode.

items.speaker: Yinlin
items.text: There should be some hints nearby. Let's look around.
